text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Oh, excuse me! I didn't see you there...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
My favorite roma—er, totally normal manga artist
just created a social media account.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
They upload art and comics daily, but it's always
late at night.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
I know I should check it out in the morning, but I
just can't wait sometimes...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Oh, but don't worry! I was productive while I
waited last night and did a bunch of push-ups!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Mejiro Ryan is sleepy for the rest of the day.
